name: Lida Holdings Limited
summary: Lida Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, and sells air compressors, electric welders, and power tools. It offers piston, screw, and scroll air compressors used in the medical, food, mining, chemical, electronic power, building materials, automobiles, steel, furniture, machinery manufacturing, and other industries. The company provides its products under the Lida, Luowei, and Eagleland brands in China, Australia, Korea, Turkey, Malaysia, South Africa, France, the United Kingdom, Belgium, Indonesia, and internationally. Lida Holdings Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands.
